data.venue_city: Ash Shaikh Hasan Ibn Abdullah Al Ash Shaikh, King Saud University, Riyadh
data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY - Incomplete data (missing odds, standings, H2H, player info). O2.5 potential (47%) conflicts with combined xG (3.72).
REASON: Al Nassr demonstrates superior xG (2.26 vs 1.46) and PPG (2.79 vs 2.14), indicating a strong performance advantage. Home Win odds (1.87) reflect this clear statistical superiority.
CONCLUSION: Home Win.
